description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized trastuzumab deruxtecan for the treatment of adult patients with advanced non-small cell lung cancer whose tumors have an activating HER2 (ERBB2) variant and who require systemic therapy following platinum-based chemotherapy with or without immunotherapy.

contributions.description: Adding EMA approvals for use to database

indication.indication: Enhertu as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with advanced NSCLC whose tumours have an activating HER2 (ERBB2) mutation and who require systemic therapy following platinum-based chemotherapy with or without immunotherapy.
